acquisition method: Information-dependent acquisition (IDA) mode was used with top 5 MS/MS scans.
alkylation reagent: alkylated in the presence of 55 mM iodoacetamide in 25 mM NH4HCO3.
alkylation concentration: alkylated in the presence of 55 mM iodoacetamide in 25 mM NH4HCO3.
cleavage agent: digested using a modified porcine trypsin solution at 4 ng/µL in 25 mM NH4HCO3.
enrichment method: co-purified by immobilized metal ion affinity chromatography (IMAC).
fragmentation method: for further isolation and HCD fragmentation.
instrument: The MS and MS/MS analyzes were performed on the TripleTOF 5600 mass spectrometer.
ionization type: with an electrospray ionization in positive polarity.
